task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenClinica web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenClinica dashboard or application interface indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify subject 'MRN-84729' was updated to 'CV-301' and the Secondary ID was cleared.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a subject list, matrix, or subject details page showing the Study Subject ID as 'CV-301' and ensuring the Secondary ID field is empty (no longer showing 'John Doe').

task_completion.description: Verify subject 'MRN-55912' was updated to 'CV-302' and the Secondary ID was cleared.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a subject list, matrix, or subject details page showing the Study Subject ID as 'CV-302' and ensuring the Secondary ID field is empty (no longer showing 'Mary Smith').

task_completion.description: Verify subject 'MRN-11048' was updated to 'CV-303' and the Secondary ID was cleared.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a subject list, matrix, or subject details page showing the Study Subject ID as 'CV-303' and ensuring the Secondary ID field is empty (no longer showing 'Robert Jones').

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Boston Heart Institute' Facility Name was updated to include 'CAPA ACTIVE'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the site administration, sites list, or facility details page showing the Facility Name for 'Boston Heart Institute' updated to include the exact phrase 'CAPA ACTIVE' (e.g., 'Boston Heart Institute - CAPA ACTIVE').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenClinica web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser and OpenClinica GUI, not terminal commands or direct database SQL queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica web interface should be visible in a browser window, not a text editor, mock interface, or static HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open and modifying the DOM to fake the updated IDs or facility name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target study: 'CV-REG-2023'. Site protocol ID: 'CV-BHI-001'. Site flag to append: 'CAPA ACTIVE'. Subjects to remediate: 'MRN-84729' (John Doe) -> 'CV-301', 'MRN-55912' (Mary Smith) -> 'CV-302', 'MRN-11048' (Robert Jones) -> 'CV-303'. Secondary IDs must be completely cleared.
